message:
fix(net): stabilize happy-eyeballs test; minor formatting cleanups

happy_eyeballs: increase connect_timeout from 200ms to 500ms to reduce
CI flakiness, and switch from the custom RuntimeBuilder to
futures_lite::future::block_on since this test does not need
deterministic scheduling.

Formatting-only changes (no logic):
- h2/stream.rs: collapse multi-line H2Error::stream closures to
  single-line form
- lab/runtime.rs: reformat long println! to multi-line
- web/websocket.rs: remove unnecessary & borrow on join() result
- tests/e2e_messaging.rs: rewrap long import line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
